title: Shaniwar Wada
tagline: Shaniwar Wada — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Shaniwar Wada is a historical fortification in the city of Pune, India.
overview.description: Shaniwar Wada is a historical fortification in the city of Pune, India. Built in 1732, it was the seat of the Peshwas of the Maratha Confederacy until 1818. The fort itself was largely destroyed in 1828 by an unexplained fire, but the surviving structures are now maintained as a tourist site.

topPlaces.name: Kasba Ganapati
topPlaces.description: The Kasba Ganapati refers to both a particular murti of the god Ganapati in Pune, India, as well as to the temple built around the murti. The Kasba Ganapati is the presiding deity (gramadevata) of Pune.

topPlaces.name: Wagholi, Pune
topPlaces.description: Wagholi is situated within the Pune Metropolitan in the Indian state of Maharashtra. Wagholi is historically kenned as the habitation of Maratha Warrior Sardar Pilajirao Changojirao Jadhavrao.

topPlaces.name: Vishrambaug Wada
topPlaces.description: Vishrambaag Wada, a mansion situated at central Pune's Thorale Bajirao Road, was the residence of Peshwa Baji Rao II, the last Peshwa of Maratha confederacy, in early 19th century. The 20,000 sq.ft.

topPlaces.name: Brahmanoli
topPlaces.description: Brahmanoli is a village in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 177 ha (437 acres).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shaniwar Wada?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shaniwar Wada is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shaniwar Wada?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (10 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (2 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shaniwar Wada?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shaniwar Wada at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shaniwar Wada?
faq.a: Stays in Shaniwar Wada start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shaniwar Wada?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kasba Ganapati, Wagholi, Pune, Vishrambaug Wada, Brahmanoli, Prabhachiwadi.
